name: Bullywug Warrior

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The bullywug can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Speak with Frogs and Toads
traits.text: The bullywug can communicate simple concepts to frogs and toads when it speaks in Bullywug.

text:
# Bullywug Warrior

*Medium Fey, Neutral*

A pompous frog-folk skirmisher that leaps from stagnant water with rapier drawn.

### Actions

**Insectile Rapier.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

### Bonus Actions

**Leap.** The bullywug can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.
